rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §19.0042 governs disclosure requirements for career and technical education program enrollment. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter.
quote: Before a person described by Section 19.005 enrolls in a district career and technical education program, the district must inform the person in writing of:
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this education disclosure statute.
